question: What is the total revenue across all transactions?
sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd;

question: How many transactions are in the database?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd;

question: What is the average discount percentage across all transactions?
sql: SELECT AVG(transaction_discount_pct) AS avg_discount_pct FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd;

question: What is the total gross profit across all transactions?
sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd;

question: What is the average sale amount per transaction?
sql: SELECT AVG(transaction_sale_amount) AS avg_sale_amount FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd;

question: What is the total revenue in 2023?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023;

question: What is the total revenue broken down by year?
sql: SELECT d.year, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.year ORDER BY d.year;

question: What is the total revenue in Q1 2024?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2024 AND d.quarter = 1;

question: What is the total revenue for each month in 2022?
sql: SELECT d.month_num, d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2022 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY d.month_num;

question: Which month in 2023 had the highest total gross profit?
sql: SELECT d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total revenue by product category?
sql: SELECT p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What are the top 5 products by total revenue?
sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the total revenue for the Footwear category?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id WHERE p.product_category = 'Footwear';

question: What is the average profit margin by product category?
sql: SELECT p.product_category, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_category ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC;

question: What is the total quantity sold by product category?
sql: SELECT p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_quantity_sold) AS total_quantity_sold FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_category ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC;

question: Who are the top 5 customers by total spending?
sql: SELECT c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_spent FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY c.customer_src_id, c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the total revenue by customer country?
sql: SELECT c.customer_country, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY c.customer_country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: How many transactions were made by customers from each country?
sql: SELECT c.customer_country, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY c.customer_country ORDER BY transaction_count DESC;

question: What is the total revenue from customers in the United States?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND c.customer_country = 'United States';

question: How many unique customers made at least one purchase?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_src_id) AS unique_customers FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE;

question: What is the total revenue generated by each employee title?
sql: SELECT e.employee_title, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY e.employee_title ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: Who are the top 10 employees by total sales?
sql: SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, e.employee_title, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_sales FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY e.employee_surr_id, e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, e.employee_title ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What is the total revenue handled by Store Managers?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE AND e.employee_title = 'Store Manager';

question: How many transactions did each employee title handle?
sql: SELECT e.employee_title, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY e.employee_title ORDER BY transaction_count DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by store branch state?
sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: Which store branch generated the highest total gross profit?
sql: SELECT s.store_branch_city, s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY s.store_branch_surr_id, s.store_branch_city, s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total revenue from stores in California?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE s.store_branch_state = 'Ca';

question: What is the average transaction value by store state?
sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, AVG(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS avg_transaction_value FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY avg_transaction_value DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by payment method?
sql: SELECT j.junk_payment_method, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id GROUP BY j.junk_payment_method ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by sales channel?
sql: SELECT j.junk_sales_channel, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id GROUP BY j.junk_sales_channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue from Credit Card payments?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id WHERE j.junk_payment_method = 'Credit Card';

question: How many transactions have a shipment status of Returned?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS returned_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id WHERE j.junk_shipment_status = 'Returned';

question: What is the total revenue from the In-Store sales channel?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id WHERE j.junk_sales_channel = 'In-Store';

question: What is the total revenue by currency?
sql: SELECT j.junk_currency_paid, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id GROUP BY j.junk_currency_paid ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by shipping method?
sql: SELECT sh.shipping_method, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_shippings sh ON f.shipping_surr_id = sh.shipping_surr_id GROUP BY sh.shipping_method ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue for Express Shipping orders?
sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_shippings sh ON f.shipping_surr_id = sh.shipping_surr_id WHERE sh.shipping_method = 'Express Shipping';

question: What is the total revenue by shipping carrier?
sql: SELECT sh.shipping_carrier, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_shippings sh ON f.shipping_surr_id = sh.shipping_surr_id GROUP BY sh.shipping_carrier ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by product category for each year?
sql: SELECT d.year, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, p.product_category ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;

question: Who are the top 5 customers from the United States by total revenue in 2023?
sql: SELECT c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_customers_scd c ON f.customer_surr_id = c.customer_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE c.is_active = TRUE AND c.customer_country = 'United States' AND d.year = 2023 GROUP BY c.customer_src_id, c.customer_firstname, c.customer_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the total revenue by sales channel and product category?
sql: SELECT j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY j.junk_sales_channel, p.product_category ORDER BY j.junk_sales_channel, total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by store state for each year?
sql: SELECT d.year, s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, s.store_branch_state ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue generated by each employee working in stores in New York?
sql: SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE AND e.employee_store_branch_state = 'Ny' GROUP BY e.employee_surr_id, e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by payment method for each year?
sql: SELECT d.year, j.junk_payment_method, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, j.junk_payment_method ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total revenue by shipping method and product category?
sql: SELECT sh.shipping_method, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_shippings sh ON f.shipping_surr_id = sh.shipping_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY sh.shipping_method, p.product_category ORDER BY sh.shipping_method, total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the total gross profit by store state in 2024?
sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE d.year = 2024 GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC;

question: What is the total revenue and total gross profit for each year?
sql: SELECT d.year, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.year ORDER BY d.year;

question: Which product has the highest average profit margin?
sql: SELECT p.product_name, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_surr_id, p.product_name ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many transactions were placed on weekends?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS weekend_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.is_weekend = TRUE;

question: What is the total revenue from transactions placed on weekends versus weekdays?
sql: SELECT d.is_weekend, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.is_weekend ORDER BY d.is_weekend;

question: What is the total revenue from transactions where the discount was greater than 20%?
sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd WHERE transaction_discount_pct > 20;
